Fabrication & repair projects
3D printing
Personal 7-printer fleet

Since 2017, built and maintain a 7-printer fleet: six FDM and one SLA resin system, all tuned to produce parts that assemble together to tight tolerances. Regularly tackle complex-geometry prints requiring multi-material solutions and creative process work. Built and calibrated multiple printers from the component level, including a custom multi-material (MMU) solution with modified, compiled open-source firmware.

Active print station: 6 FDM printers, 1 SLA resin system, dedicated filament management

Trad-Rack 9-filament MMU, assembled and calibrated from printed components

Illuminated double helix: PLA uprights, clear PETG connectors, integrated LED and microcontroller in base

CNC
CNC fleet & laser systems

Designed, built, and calibrated a four-machine CNC fleet spanning small and large format, including one machine with a 4th-axis rotary setup and a dedicated laser engraver. Produces functional parts, LED signage, and precision cuts in wood and acrylic. Each CNC runs interchangeable router, spindle, and laser tool heads with all offsets and alignment done independently. Services laser and optical systems including module replacement, lens work, and focal distance calibration. Modified and compiled open-source motion control firmware for custom hardware configurations.

Large-format CNC router, custom build with printed components

Second large-format CNC, Makita router head mounted

Completed LED neon sign orders ready for delivery

LED neon sign mid-assembly, acrylic backing cut on CNC

Layered laser-cut mandala cross, multi-layer assembly

Laser engraved portrait on wood

Break-fix
NVR appliance recovery

Restored a network video recorder appliance that the original vendor had deemed irreparable. Diagnosed the fault on the first visit, sourced the replacement part, and returned to complete the repair, saving the client the full cost of replacement hardware and returning full security camera coverage after a two-week outage. Ongoing multi-year consulting relationship for computer, server, and appliance repair, with all travel and logistics managed independently.

Field service experience
2018 – Present
Independent Technical Services
Field Service & Fabrication Consultant

Equipment repair, 3D printing, CNC fabrication, and onsite technical consulting for local businesses. Built and maintains a 7-printer personal fleet (6 FDM, 1 SLA) and a 4-machine CNC fleet including a 4th-axis setup and dedicated laser engraver. Produces functional parts, LED signage, and precision cuts in wood and acrylic. Travels onsite to repair and service computers, rack-mounted servers, and NVR appliances; all travel and logistics managed independently.

2016 – 2018
Veritas Technologies
Sr. Principal Business Critical Engineer

Named accounts: Morgan Stanley, AT&T, HP/HPE/HPI, Nationwide, US SOCOM (TS Clearance). Maintained continuity across the $7.4B Veritas/Symantec separation with zero loss of tier-one clients. Guided HP's split into HPE and HPI enabling the rapid commissioning of roughly 1,000 new clustered nodes while simultaneously dividing existing infrastructure, one of the largest single deployment engagements in the account's history.

2005 – 2016
Symantec Corporation
Sr. Principal Business Critical Engineer

Named accounts across Fortune 100 enterprises. Flew to customer sites during declared disasters, providing onsite technical leadership during live failovers and critical-downtime recovery. Managed 50+ Sev1 escalations per year at peak. Delivered structured training sessions, live demos, and a customer-facing technical webinar. Maintained detailed Salesforce records with custom executive dashboards. Managed national travel logistics independently across a portfolio of 8 to 10 named accounts and 75 pooled accounts, handling flights, hotels, rental cars, and expense reporting throughout.

2001 – 2005
Veritas Software
Technical Support Engineer

24x7 support for Fortune 500 customers across Windows, Solaris, AIX, HP-UX, and Linux. Authored technical documentation and runbooks. Recognized with the Veritas Golden Pen Award for outstanding technical documentation.
